name: rz-compress
description: Try-all lossless compressor + context-mixing coder (lpaq). Multi-file archives, AES-256 encryption, GUI. Beats gzip/brotli/xz on text.

scripts.test: node router.js --selftest && node lpaq.js --selftest && node cm.js --selftest && node archive.js --selftest && node enc.js --selftest

author: Rajesh J
